implemented: Priority German TTS rules for (von + Dat.), (für + Akk.), and (jdn./etw.).
Options language switch closes the drawer and updates current card/session immediately.
Voice mapping is displayed in a clean dedicated card.
Wortart filtern dropdown updates the deck immediately.
PWA install prompt with localStorage flag added.
Synonyms displayed under headword with exact stored counts.
limitations: The app enforces exact synonym counts from available dataset fields, but true 99% semantic verification requires a semantic API.
Native PWA install prompt appears only in browsers/platforms that fire beforeinstallprompt.
Exact Azure voice output still requires voices exposed by the browser or backend-generated audio.
